use_cases: Floating action menu for quick navigation actions in SaaS dashboards
Radial context menu for creative tools and design software
Expandable navigation hub for mobile-first web applications
Quick links menu for portfolio and landing pages
Alternative to traditional dropdown menus in modern web interfaces
ai_summary: A circular expandable menu component that reveals menu items arranged radially around a central trigger button. Features smooth spring-based animations with staggered timing, hover effects with brightness changes, and clean minimalist styling. The menu calculates item positions mathematically on a circle and animates between collapsed and expanded states using framer-motion. Ideal for dashboards, creative tools, and modern navigation patterns where space efficiency and visual appeal are priorities.
